content:
# Reservoir Modeling

**Summary**: Broad research theme addressed in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997]] contributed to the theme of Reservoir Modeling

- [[2013-atig|atig, 2013]] applied reservoir modeling to predict sand body geometry in the Safaniya member.

- [[2015-jabir|Jabir, 2015]] performed reservoir-modeling to create a 3D geocellular model of the Bentiu-1 interval.

- [[2023-kusuma|Kusuma, 2023]] applied reservoir modeling techniques to populate properties in 3D space.

- [[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024]] applied reservoir modeling to characterize the Moki sandstone and Upper Manganui seal.

## Key Subtopics



- [[2013-atig|atig, 2013]] applied reservoir modeling to predict sand body geometry in the Safaniya member.

- [[2015-jabir|Jabir, 2015]] performed reservoir-modeling to create a 3D geocellular model of the Bentiu-1 interval.

- [[2023-kusuma|Kusuma, 2023]] applied reservoir modeling techniques to populate properties in 3D space.

- [[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024]] applied reservoir modeling to characterize the Moki sandstone and Upper Manganui seal.

## Methods and Approaches Used



## Key Findings Across Sources

- contributed to the theme of Reservoir Modeling ([[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997]])

- Indicator Kriging was determined as the optimum way to predict rock bodies. ([[2013-atig|atig, 2013, p. 12]])

- A 3-D stochastic geocellular model was established to characterize lithofacies heterogeneity and major reservoir architectures. ([[2015-jabir|Jabir, 2015, p. 13]])

- Combining ML (SVM) and geostatistics is the best approach for 3D prediction. ([[2023-kusuma|Kusuma, 2023, p. 20]])

- Porosity values in the Moki formation were modeled between 15% and 22%. ([[2024-maigana|Maigana, 2024, p. 61]])
